query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS raw_api_response (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    capture_time    DATETIME(3)   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    capture_epoch_ms BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    method          VARCHAR(10)   NOT NULL,
    url             VARCHAR(2048) NOT NULL,
    request_body    JSON          DEFAULT NULL,
    http_status     SMALLINT      NOT NULL,
    response_body   LONGTEXT      NOT NULL,
    response_hash   CHAR(64)      DEFAULT NULL,
    eh_host         VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,
    endpoint_name   VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,
    INDEX idx_raw_capture_time (capture_time),
    INDEX idx_raw_endpoint (endpoint_name),
    INDEX idx_raw_hash (response_hash)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3xenzgJ3NGNThF2.e615124e9d05 --database FAgcVHDa53BkVwvRfvbPzh --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS raw_api_response (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    capture_time    DATETIME(3)   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    capture_epoch_ms BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    method          VARCHAR(10)   NOT NULL,
    url             VARCHAR(2048) NOT NULL,
    request_body    JSON          DEFAULT NULL,
    http_status     SMALLINT      NOT NULL,
    response_body   LONGTEXT      NOT NULL,
    response_hash   CHAR(64)      DEFAULT NULL,
    eh_host         VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,
    endpoint_name   VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,
    INDEX idx_raw_capture_time (capture_time),
    INDEX idx_raw_endpoint (endpoint_name),
    INDEX idx_raw_hash (response_hash)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
